direction: reuse cached owner normal velocity in KLAS3 on the KLAS1-index parent
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel already computes the owner-cell normal velocity in QL[1] before boundary dispatch. v75_k1args CalculateKlas3 reloads COSF/SINF and recomputes the same U_pre/COS plus V_pre/SIN projection only to form QZH3. Reusing QL[1] removes redundant geometry reads and FP64 multiply-add work while preserving the side-length multiply and all downstream flux arithmetic.
